title: Copper Golem Hats
body:
You can use **any item** as a hat on your Copper Golems!

### Copper Nugget in Offhand, Item of your choice in Mainhand:

Places the **block** form on top of the Copper Golem's head

Doesn't place anything if there is no block form

### Copper Nugget in Mainhand, Item of your choice in Offhand:

Places the **item** form behind the Copper Golem's rod

If there is no item form, places the **block** form of the item onto the Copper Golem's head


![Copper Golem getting a Hat](https://media2.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExdDB4M3B0MDg2ZDN1bGttYnRzaWJqZm9zdWNvdDFkdzU2YXBkdnBkcyZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/p9jFTigvWqKf4rfQL5/giphy.gif)

![Copper Golem getting a Lower Hat](https://media2.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExOG5jaTUyajFhdHdnM3dtcThqN2l0azQ3Y2lqcGtzdTI1c3Rzang0OSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/j029mLLdVcsyxZXcaA/giphy.gif)


Only consumes the nugget and keeps your item

Contact me on Discord for any issues! @hexasan
